ItacPersonItem.Notes: `Mathematicae, et Civilis Philosophiae in Alma Urbis Gymnasio Professoris` (see Istoria e dimostrazioni... 1613). Joined the Lincei in 1612, and left when following the condemnation of the doctrine about the motion of Earth. See A. De Ferrari, `Cesi, Federico`, in DBI, and Gabrieli, Contributi, I, p. 445.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
